Off.description: The component has been switched off

Ready.description: The component is waiting for a start dosing signal

Dosing.description: The component is actively feeding material

Calibration.description: Component is in calibration mode and can typically not be used for dosing or filling

Error.description: The component has an active error

Cleaning.description: The component is in cleaning mode e.g. hopper draining

Purging.description: The component is in purging mode

Priming.description: The component is in priming mode

AbortCalibration.description: Abort the current calibration sequence for this component.

AbortCleaning.description: Method without arguments to abort the current cleaning sequence.

IdentifyComponent.description: The dosing component on which this method is called shows itself by e.g. activation of a LED.

StartCalibration.description: Start the automated calibration sequence for this component.

StartCleaning.description: Start the automated cleaning sequence for this component.

BulkDensity.description: Bulk density of the material which is dosed (not to be confused with the density of the material itself defined in MaterialType).

DosingMode.description: Provides information, how the dosing of the component is controlled.

FeedRateScalingFactor.description: Material-specific output of the Component per DrivePercentage.

IsActive.description: Provides information if the dosing component is active in the current production.

IsPresent.description: Indicates if the hardware of this component is installed.

SetActive.description: Activates the dosing component for the current production.

State.title: ComponentStateEnumeration
State.description: The actual working state of the component.

Weight.description: Weight of the Material (e.g. inside the hopper).

data.description: Bulk density of the material which is dosed (not to be confused with the density of the material itself defined in MaterialType).
Provides information, how the dosing of the component is controlled.
Activates the dosing component for the current production.

data.title: ComponentStateEnumeration
data.description: The actual working state of the component.
Weight of the Material (e.g. inside the hopper).

StartPriming.description: Method to start the priming function on the component.

StopPriming.description: Method to stop the priming function on the component.

DeviceMappingNumber.description: Unique identifier/address/number for devices of the same DeviceType within a local network.

DisplayLanguage.description: With the DisplayLanguage Property the client can set the desired language on the user interface at the Dosing System.

IsContinuous.description: The dosing device can be installed on an extruder (EXT) or an injection moulding machine (IMM). EXT is a continuous process, IMM is a cyclic process. For inline dosing devices, directly mounted on the feed throat of an IMM the IsContinuous flag is false, when installed on an EXT this flag is true.

AbortFilling.description: Method to abort filling the Component.

StartFilling.description: Method to fill the Component up to the MaxValue of the MonitoredParameterType in the Level Variable.

Filling.description: Flag to indicate if the hopper is being filled right now.

data.description: Flag to indicate if the hopper is being filled right now.

Reset.description: The Method Reset resets the two counters TotalConsumption and Scrap.

Scrap.description: Total mass or volume of fed scrap since last reset.

TotalConsumption.description: Total mass or volume of fed material (good + scrap) since last reset.

data.description: Total mass or volume of fed scrap since last reset.
Total mass or volume of fed material (good + scrap) since last reset.

MaterialClass.description: Provides information about the material class, which can be used for the recipe calculation by the server or client.

data.description: Provides information about the material class, which can be used for the recipe calculation by the server or client.

IdleMixing.description: With idle mixing the mixer of the batch blender rotates once in a while to keep the material in the mixer flowing and material does not get blocked by the mixer blades.

MixingInterval.description: Interval between two mixing processes, in number of shots.

MixingMode.description: Can be used to set the required mixing mode.

data.description: With idle mixing the mixer of the batch blender rotates once in a while to keep the material in the mixer flowing and material does not get blocked by the mixer blades.
Can be used to set the required mixing mode.

DisableDevice.description: Disables the device, for example deactivate motor drives.

EnableDevice.description: Enables the device, for example activate motor drives. Triggers the transition from MachineryItemState NotAvailable to NotExecuting.

FirstFilling.description: Method to fill the DosingSystem for the first time with the mixture of materials from the current recipe.

IdentifyDevice.description: The DosingSystem on which this method is called shows itself by e.g. activation of a LED.

ResetAllErrors.description: Method to reset all errors of the device.

ResetErrorById.description: Method to reset one error of the device.

Id.description: Id of the error, listed in ActiveErrors, that shall be reset.

StartDosingContinuous.description: If EnableDosingOpcUa is TRUE, this method can be used to start dosing continuously.

StartDosingShot.description: If EnableDosingOpcUa is TRUE, this method can be used to start dosing for one shot with a defined duration specified by DosingDuration.

StartPurge.description: Method to start the purging function on the dosing system.

StopDosingAfterCycle.description: Method to stop dosing after the current dosing cycle (e.g. to get a valid batch mix with batch blending).

ActiveErrors.description: List of the active errors of the device.

items.title: ActiveErrorDataType
items.description: Iinformation about an active error in a device

Severity.description: Severity as defined in the BaseEventType (1 = low – 1000 = high)

Message.description: Message giving information about the error

DosingDuration.description: This parameter defines the duration the dosing shall be active after receiving the StartDosingShot signal.

EnableDosingOpcUa.description: Variable to set and read the actual state how the dosing signal is transferred from the client to the dosing system in addition to RemoteControlOpcUa.

HighestActiveAlarmSeverity.description: Indication of the severity of the highest active alarm.

IsActive.description: The IsActive Property provides information if the dosing unit is active in the current production.

PurgeDuration.description: Duration of the purging function of the dosing system.

SetActive.description: Activates the dosing unit for the current production.

data.description: List of the active errors of the device.

items.title: ActiveErrorDataType
items.description: Iinformation about an active error in a device

Severity.description: Severity as defined in the BaseEventType (1 = low – 1000 = high)

Message.description: Message giving information about the error

data.description: This parameter defines the duration the dosing shall be active after receiving the StartDosingShot signal.
Variable to set and read the actual state how the dosing signal is transferred from the client to the dosing system in addition to RemoteControlOpcUa.
Duration of the purging function of the dosing system.
Activates the dosing unit for the current production.

TestWeight.description: Weight of the material of this component.

data.description: Weight of the material of this component.

SEPARATE_INTERFACE.description: Using a separate interface from the production machine for remote controlling this dosing device

OPC_UA.description: Using this OPC UA connection for remote controlling this dosing device

Off.description: The component has been switched off

Ready.description: The component is waiting for a start dosing signal

Dosing.description: The component is actively feeding material

Calibration.description: Component is in calibration mode and can typically not be used for dosing or filling

Error.description: The component has an active error

Cleaning.description: The component is in cleaning mode e.g. hopper draining

Purging.description: The component is in purging mode

Priming.description: The component is in priming mode

ONLY_CONVEYING.description: The throughput is not controlled. The feeder only transports the material (e.g. by screw, conveyor belt) or the material is only falling through a feed opening.

VOLUMETRIC.description: The throughput is controlled by a volumetric dosing system.

GRAVIMETRIC.description: The throughput is controlled by a gravimetric dosing system.

OTHER.description: Throughput is controlled, but in another mode than these above.

SEPARATE_INTERFACE.description: Using a separate interface from the production machine for remote controlling this dosing device

OPC_UA.description: Using this OPC UA connection for remote controlling this dosing device
